name: L.A. Noire
post_apply_message:
V-Patch loads through dinput8.dll, which Proton ignores by default. Set this launch option in Steam (right-click game > Properties > Launch Options):

  WINEDLLOVERRIDES="dinput8=n,b" %command%

(A future launch_options step will automate this.)
notes: V-Patch 2.0 for L.A. Noire: Complete Edition, by VaanaCZ (Aug 2024). FPS uncap + aspect ratio/ultrawide fixes via Ultimate ASI Loader. Source: https://github.com/VaanaCZ/LANVP — license CC BY-NC 4.0, see docs/. Config: plugins/lanvp.ini in the game dir after install.
